title: polystichum kodamae
intro: Polystichum kodamae is a species of fern native to Japan, belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae and is also known as Kodama's fern. The plant has been used in traditional Japanese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum kodamae include the potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use in treating fever and sore throats. In herbal preparations, Polystichum kodamae is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
